ddls:
CREATE TABLE "employees" (
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employee */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the employee */,
  "height_meter" REAL /* Height of the employee in meters */,
  "weight_kg" REAL /* Weight of the employee in kilograms */,
  "children" INTEGER /* Number of children the employee has */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Job title of the employee */,
  "academic_degree" TEXT /* Highest academic degree obtained */,
  "salary" REAL /* Annual salary of the employee */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographical location of the employee */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the employee */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the employee */,
  "emergency_contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the emergency contact for the employee */,
  "emergency_contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the emergency contact */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_occupation FOREIGN KEY ("occupation") REFERENCES positions ("position_title")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the department within the organization */,
  "head_of_department" TEXT /* Name of the head of the department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "positions" (
  "position_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each position */,
  "position_title" TEXT /* Title of the job position */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department the position belongs to */,
  "salary_range" TEXT /* Salary range for the position */,
  "job_description" TEXT /* Description of the job responsibilities */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("position_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_positions_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee being reviewed */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date when the review took place */,
  "score" INTEGER /* Score given in the review */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments from the reviewer */,
  "reviewer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the reviewer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_reviews_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_reviews_reviewer_id FOREIGN KEY ("reviewer_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "educational_backgrounds" (
  "education_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each educational record */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee associated with the education */,
  "degree" TEXT /* Degree obtained by the employee */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution from which the degree was obtained */,
  "year_of_graduation" INTEGER /* Year when the degree was awarded */,
  "major" TEXT /* Major field of study */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("education_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_educational_backgrounds_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "benefits" (
  "benefit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each benefit record */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee receiving the benefit */,
  "benefit_type" TEXT /* Type of the benefit (e.g., health insurance, pension) */,
  "benefit_value" REAL /* Value of the benefit provided */,
  "provider" TEXT /* Name of the benefit provider */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("benefit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_benefits_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employee_engagement" (
  "engagement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each engagement survey result */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee participating in the survey */,
  "survey_date" TEXT /* Date when the survey was conducted */,
  "engagement_score" INTEGER /* Score representing the employee's engagement level */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments from the employee */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("engagement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employee_engagement_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "training_courses" (
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each training course */,
  "course_name" TEXT /* Name of the training course */,
  "provider" TEXT /* Provider of the training */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the course in hours */,
  "cost" REAL /* Cost of the course */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the course */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employee_training" (
  "employee_training_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employee training record */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee who completed the training */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the training course completed */,
  "completion_date" TEXT /* Date when the training was completed */,
  "evaluation_score" INTEGER /* Score given in the evaluation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employee_training_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employee_training_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES training_courses ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employee_training_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "salaries" (
  "salary_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each salary record */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee associated with the salary */,
  "salary_amount" REAL /* Amount of the salary */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date when the salary becomes effective */,
  "reason_for_change" TEXT /* Reason for the salary change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("salary_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_salaries_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., Admin, HR Manager) */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level associated with the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "attendance" (
  "attendance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attendance record */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee whose attendance is recorded */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the attendance record */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the attendance (e.g., Present, Absent) */,
  "hours_worked" INTEGER /* Number of hours worked */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attendance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_attendance_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exit_interviews" (
  "interview_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each exit interview */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee undergoing the exit interview */,
  "interview_date" TEXT /* Date of the exit interview */,
  "feedback" TEXT /* Feedback provided by the employee */,
  "reason_for_leaving" TEXT /* Reason for leaving the organization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interview_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_exit_interviews_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "goals" (
  "goal_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each goal */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee associated with the goal */,
  "goal_description" TEXT /* Description of the goal */,
  "target_date" TEXT /* Target date for achieving the goal */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the goal (e.g., In Progress, Achieved) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("goal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_goals_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "progress_trackers" (
  "tracker_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each progress tracker */,
  "goal_id" INTEGER /* ID of the goal being tracked */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee whose progress is being tracked */,
  "progress_date" TEXT /* Date of the progress update */,
  "progress_description" TEXT /* Description of the progress made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tracker_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_progress_trackers_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_progress_trackers_goal_id FOREIGN KEY ("goal_id") REFERENCES goals ("goal_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "talent_pipelines" (
  "pipeline_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each talent pipeline */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee in the pipeline */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role or position in the pipeline */,
  "potential_successor" TEXT /* Name of the potential successor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pipeline_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_talent_pipelines_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "succession_plans" (
  "plan_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each succession plan */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role or position in the succession plan */,
  "current_incumbent" TEXT /* Name of the current incumbent */,
  "potential_successor" TEXT /* Name of the potential successor */,
  "development_plan" TEXT /* Description of the development plan for the successor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("plan_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_succession_plans_current_incumbent FOREIGN KEY ("current_incumbent") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_succession_plans_potential_successor FOREIGN KEY ("potential_successor") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)
